statement: In every magma, Equation 899 (`x = y * ((x * z) * (z * z))`) implies Equation 4591 (`(x * x) * x = (y * y) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0355
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op x z) (op z z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op (op x x) x) = (op (op y y) y)
